# meraki_radio_rrm_by_network (Data Source)

This data source can read the `Radio RRM By Network` configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "meraki_radio_rrm_by_network" "example" {
  organization_id = "123456"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object
- `items` (Attributes List) List of RRM settings (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `meta_counts_items_remaining` (Number) Number of items remaining after this page
- `meta_counts_items_total` (Number) Total number of items available

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `ai_enabled` (Boolean) Toggle for enabling or disabling AI in a network
- `ai_last_enabled_at` (String) Time at which AI was last enabled in the network
- `busy_hour_minimize_changes_enabled` (Boolean) Toggle for enabling or disabling Busy Hour in a network
- `busy_hour_schedule_automatic_end` (String) The hour that Automatic Busy Hour ends each day, in the network time zone
- `busy_hour_schedule_automatic_start` (String) The hour that Automatic Busy Hour starts each day, in the network time zone
- `busy_hour_schedule_manual_end` (String) The hour that Manual Busy Hour ends each day, in the network time zone
- `busy_hour_schedule_manual_start` (String) The hour that Manual Busy Hour starts each day, in the network time zone
- `busy_hour_schedule_mode` (String) The Busy Hour mode applied to the network when minimizeChanges is enabled. Must be one of `automatic` or `manual`. Automatic busy hour is only available on firmware versions >= MR 27.0
- `channel_avoidance_enabled` (Boolean) Toggle for enabling or disabling channel avoidance in a network
- `fra_enabled` (Boolean) Toggle to activate or deactivate FRA in a network, contingent on AI-RRM being enabled.
- `name` (String) Name of the network
- `network_id` (String) Id of the network
- `time_zone` (String) Time zone of the network
